_comment: TrustFoundry public API search provider for case-question recall. Sends per-row state by default because the public API currently requires state for non-citation searches. The runner derives `limit` from the scorer's max cutoff (cutoffs ∪ headline_cutoff) so recall@K is always backed by enough returned results. If the derived limit exceeds the public-api caller cap (currently 25), the gateway returns 400 — loud surface that the caller cap or scorer cutoff needs updating.
